HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

 Static Public Member Functions inherited from Domain
static void EnableAccurate ()
 Enable globally more accurate (and usually slower) evaluation.
 
 Static Protected Attributes inherited from Domain
static bool NeedsAccurate = false
 Flag for accurate computation.
 

Detailed Description

Concrete domain for homogeneous 3D media.

Responsibilities beyond those of Domain:

  • Hold constant material parameters (epsilon, mu).
  • Build a homogeneous Green's function (GreenFHom3D).
  • Provide homogeneous Epsilon/Mu queries.
  • Instantiate a PMCHWT formulation for assembly.
  • Implement cross‑section post‑processing via triangle quadrature.

Definition at line 31 of file DomainHom3D.h.

Construct a homogeneous domain and immediately create its Green's function.

Parameters
inMeshSurface mesh containing region inDIndex.
inDIndexDomain region index in inMesh.
inEpsilonRelative permittivity \(\varepsilon_r\).
inMuRelative permeability \(\mu_r\).
inVacuumWavelengthFree‑space wavelength \(\lambda_0\).

Construct a homogeneous domain, optionally skipping Green's function creation.

Parameters
inMeshSurface mesh containing region inDIndex.
inDIndexDomain region index in inMesh.
inEpsilonRelative permittivity \(\varepsilon_r\).
inMuRelative permeability \(\mu_r\).
inVacuumWavelengthFree‑space wavelength \(\lambda_0\).
parentIf true, do not call InitGrnFun() here (used by owners/aggregates).

double DomainHom3D::absorptionCS ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 1 > * solVector)
virtual

Absorption cross section via surface quadrature.

Parameters
solVectorSolution coefficients \(\mathbf{x}\).
Returns
Absorption cross section.
Note
Not always accurate (volumetric methods based on Ohmic losses have better accuracy).

Integrates the inward Poynting component of total fields.

Implements Domain.

virtual

Extinction cross section via surface quadrature.

Parameters
solVectorSolution coefficients \(\mathbf{x}\).

Extinction cross section.

Extinction cross section via interference of incident and scattered fields.

◆ scatteringCS()

std::vector< double > DomainHom3D::scatteringCS ( blitz::Array< dcmplx, 1 > * solVector)
virtual

Scattering cross section via surface quadrature.

Parameters
solVectorSolution coefficients \(\mathbf{x}\).
Returns
Scattering cross section and near-field intesity.

Builds per‑triangle field samples (E,H) from RWG coefficients, integrates the outward Poynting component of the scattered field, and the near-field intensity.

Implements Domain.
